user.title: Creality Ender-3 V3 KE — Connection Mode
user.description:
Choose how Home Assistant will communicate with your printer.

**Native WebSocket** works with stock firmware — no extra software, port 9999.

**Moonraker API** requires Moonraker installed via SSH, port 7125.

connection.title: Creality Ender-3 V3 KE — Printer Address
connection.description: Enter the IP address shown on your printer: **Settings → Network**.

offsets.title: Creality Ender-3 V3 KE — Temperature Correction
offsets.description:
Some Creality printers report temperatures slightly lower than the actual value via the API. Enter the correction to add to each raw reading.

**Bed offset +10 °C** is the typical value for the V3 KE.

Set to **0** if your temperatures are already accurate.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the printer. Check IP address (Settings → Network on printer), port (9999 for WebSocket), and make sure both are on the same network.

init.title: Temperature Correction
init.description: Adjust temperature offsets added to raw printer readings.
